title: Guns - Greenboy's Legendary Guns
description: This Mod Adds 15 Unique Guns With Epic Models And Animations
body:
Legendary Guns V4

V4 is out now!
This update brings upgraded gun models, new weapons, enhanced textures, and smoother animations.

✨ What’s New in V4

15 total guns now available

Remade all models and textures for better quality

Fixed glitches and bugs across the project

Better animations for firing, reloading, and handling

Left Click → Fire

Right Click → Scope

Added a small crosshair for better aiming

Bullets are now separated by type, each works differently for different guns

Press V → Opens customization menu

Press I → Inspect your weapon

Some scoped guns (AUG, Sniper, Shotguns) currently don’t support customization

🔧 Requirements

Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge

GeckoLib (for animations)

📜 Features

This mod adds unique and legendary guns to vanilla Minecraft with classic animations and customization options.

15+ guns with realistic models

Custom crafting system with a Gun Crafter block

Weapon customization (scopes, silencers, grips)

Multiplayer support

Balanced damage and ammo system

Enhanced gun sounds (each gun has unique audio)

🔑 Keybinds

Left Click → Fire

Right Click → Scope (on supported guns)

R → Reload

V → Open customization menu

I → Inspect weapon

🔫 Guns List

Pistol

Scar Rifle

AK-47 Rifle

AUG Rifle

Sniper

Kar98K

M4A1 Rifle

MP5 SMG

Machine Gun

Shotgun

Rocket Launcher

🧩 Customization & Items

Attachments: Scope, Silencer, Extra Grip, Sniper Grip

Crafting Parts: Muzzle, Magazine, Back Body

Bullets:

Standard Bullets (used by most guns)

Rocket Launcher Ammo

🖼️ Media & Crafting

Check the Media tab for crafting recipes and showcase images.

Created by GreenboyGamerr.
